string.text:
The newly adopted Close Quarters Battle rifle made by Izhmash. Developed in response to a growing need made apparent by the FSB, the ShAK-12 was purpose built to house an enormous stopping power ability inside of a compact rifle package. It borrows its 12.7x55mm cartridge from the VSSK Vykhlop sniper rifle and utilizes 20 round magazines. Along with sporting a full array of picatinny attachment rails, it also features a removable carry handle for larger optic mounting options. The short recoil operation of the barrel behaves much in the same way as a Barrett M82 does with the barrel recoiling with the bolt to assist in controllability and cartridge extraction.
 A weapon like this is sure to make it into any STALKER's wishlist, but few will know what it feels like to own it. Whatever the case, there is no suit in the Zone that can withstand the power this gun deals out. Just make sure you aim well, are close and have a good stash of money, because the ammunition is anything but "cheap and available".
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] ACOG, Barska ES AC10632, C-more Railway Tactical, EOTech scopes
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] 12.7x55mm compatible suppressor
 %c[ui_gray_2]COMPATIBLE MOD KITS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Default: Replacement weapon kit

The ShAK-12, (Russian: ШАК-12) originally under the name ASh-12.7 (АШ-12.7, which stands for "Автомат штурмовой 12.7мм" or "automatic assault 12.7mm") battle rifle is a dedicated CQB/Urban Operations weapon, developed by TsKIB SOO ("Central Design and Research Bureau of Sporting and Hunting Arms"), a subsidiary of the KBP Instrument Design Bureau of Tula, Russia.
 The weapon was designed with extreme short-range stopping power in mind for urban combat. The ShAK-12 features a bullpup layout, with a stamped steel receiver and a polymer housing/stock. Firing controls include two separate levers; a fire mode selector (Semi/Auto) at the rear and an ambidextrous safety (Safe/Fire) above the pistol grip.
 This tactical version features a "flat top" configuration with a Picatinny rail running on top of the receiver, and an AN/PEQ-15 (ATPIAL) in battle grey with a green laser.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Permanent: AN/PEQ-15 (ATPIAL), for scopes with magnification: Trijicon RMR Red Dot Sight installed on a 45° mount
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes (Bas): almost all colimators and scopes (no sniper scopes)
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: KZRZP suppressor
 %c[ui_gray_2]COMPATIBLE MOD KITS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Default: Custom, Specialized weapon kits
